content: WebRTC on Fargate: awsvpc tasks need public IP assignment and SG ingress for the bounded UDP media range; ALB only carries HTTPS signaling (default idle timeout 60s kills long-lived signaling/WS; raise to minutes + heartbeats). aiortc advertises the ENI's private IP as host candidate by default — behind Fargate's public-IP mapping you must inject the task public IP (ECS task metadata v4) or use STUN so candidates are reachable. Local-to-cloud migration is the classic breakage point.
